Sandbox.//urls: These are dialed by the container ON THE WORKER, so they must be reachable from that worker. Same-host dev: host.docker.internal (+ AddHostGateway true). Different machine: this backend's LAN address (+ AddHostGateway false).
Sandbox.//creds: Optional. Unset ⇒ the WORKER's own ~/.claude etc. (probed via $HOME). Whatever these resolve to is STAGED into a uid-readable copy on the worker so the non-root container can read it.
